title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-20
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking on all the community apps in the greenhouse to make sure they're healthy and thriving.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md directories.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot checking on plants in a greenhouse. The plants represent the community apps. The robot is recording metrics on a clipboard, acting as the automated bot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot in a lush digital greenhouse. The robot is holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background with warm sunlight filtering through the glass. Cozy 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, Stardew Valley vibes, emotionally warm.
